data.title: 国际服主线关卡开放：Area16
data.summary: [New Mission Available Notice] Check out Mission Area 16 in the 5/31 (Tue) update. T6 Equipment Blue
data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 16 in the 5/31 (Tue) update.
T6 Equipment Blueprints in Normal Missions, and Hina’s Eleph in Hard Missions have been added as new rewards!

#BlueArchive![VQKsZFmUy7juKC10PfvKPzXonFtHmDgv.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/VQKsZFmUy7juKC10PfvKPzXonFtHmDgv.jpg)
